title: SegQC JSON Report v0
description: Machine-readable QC report schema v0 for segqc. Extended by Stage 2 with a 'features' block.

schema_version.description: Version discriminator for this report schema. Always '0.1' for v0 reports.

config_version.description: The schema_version from the HeuristicConfig that produced this report, for reproducibility.

verdict.description: Overall QC verdict for the case.

reasons.description: Case-level QC findings (not tied to a specific label).

per_label.description: Per-label QC findings, keyed by the string representation of the integer label value.

reason.description: A single QC finding with a human-readable message, severity, and optional label attribution.

labels.description: Integer label values that contributed to this finding. Empty for case-level findings.
